semanticActions.intent: Load the bootstrapped story run manifest by slice key.
Materialize the generated cognitive provider worker adapter from SEJ.
Run the generated worker adapter with a run-local dispatch packet.
Emit Business Analysis hardening receipt after live provider candidate is captured.
Materialize a Review Package proving live cognitive participation.

steps.intent: Materialize generated Node worker adapter for live cognitive BA provider execution.

contentRef: #!/usr/bin/env node
// GENERATED BY DEFRACTO SEJ MATERIALIZATION. DO NOT EDIT.
// sourceSOG: contracts/semantic-operation-graphs/build/live-cognitive-ba-proof.execute.sog.v1.json
'use strict';
const fs = require('node:fs');
const path = require('node:path');
const crypto = require('node:crypto');
function ensureDir(filePath) { fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true }); }
function writeJson(filePath, value) { ensureDir(filePath); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(value)); return filePath; }
function sha256File(filePath) { return 'sha256:' + crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(filePath)).digest('hex'); }
function readText(filePath) { return fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'); }

function asJsonText(text) { const trimmed = String(text || '').trim().replace(/^```json\s*/i, '').replace(/^```\s*/i, '').replace(/```$/i, '').trim(); const first = trimmed.indexOf('{'); const last = trimmed.lastIndexOf('}'); return first >= 0 && last >= first ? trimmed.slice(first, last + 1) : trimmed; }

function parseCandidate(text) { try { return JSON.parse(asJsonText(text)); } catch { return { analysis: { rawProviderText: String(text || '') }, ambiguities: ['provider_response_json_parse_failed'], acceptanceRecommendations: [] }; } }

function outputTextFromOpenAi(data) { if (data.output_text) return data.output_text; const parts = []; for (const item of data.output || []) for (const content of item.content || []) if (content.text) parts.push(content.text); return parts.join('\n'); }

function outputTextFromGemini(data) { const parts = []; for (const candidate of data.candidates || []) for (const part of (((candidate || {}).content || {}).parts || [])) if (part.text) parts.push(part.text); return parts.join('\n'); }

function candidateFrom(provider, model, dispatch, parsed) { return { schemaVersion: 'defracto.business-analysis-candidate.v1', status: 'candidate', providerKey: provider, workerKey: provider === 'gemini_flash' ? 'defracto.workers.gemini_flash.story_to_tdd.v1' : 'defracto.workers.openai.story_to_tdd.v1', model, sourceStoryHash: dispatch.sourceStory.hash, analysis: parsed.analysis || parsed, ambiguities: Array.isArray(parsed.ambiguities) ? parsed.ambiguities : [], acceptanceRecommendations: Array.isArray(parsed.acceptanceRecommendations) ? parsed.acceptanceRecommendations : [], candidateOnlyUntilHardened: true }; }

async function callGemini(dispatch, prompt, paths) { const key = process.env.LOC_GEMINI_API_KEY || process.env.GOOGLE_API_KEY; const model = dispatch.providers.gemini.model; writeJson(paths.geminiDispatch, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.provider-dispatch.v1', status: 'dispatched', providerKey: 'gemini_flash', workerKey: 'defracto.workers.gemini_flash.story_to_tdd.v1', model, sourceStoryHash: dispatch.sourceStory.hash, acceptedEnvVars: ['LOC_GEMINI_API_KEY', 'GOOGLE_API_KEY'], secretMaterialWritten: false }); if (!key) { writeJson(paths.geminiFailureReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.gemini-invocation-receipt.v1', status: 'blocked', blocker: 'gemini_api_key_missing', worker: 'defracto.workers.gemini_flash.v1', invocationCapability: 'worker.gemini_flash.invoke.v1', acceptedEnvVars: ['LOC_GEMINI_API_KEY', 'GOOGLE_API_KEY'], secretMaterialWritten: false }); return null; } const request = { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }; writeJson(paths.geminiRequest, request); const url = 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/' + encodeURIComponent(model) + ':generateContent?key=' + encodeURIComponent(key); const response = await fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(request) }); const rawText = await response.text(); ensureDir(paths.geminiRaw); fs.writeFileSync(paths.geminiRaw, rawText); if (!response.ok) { writeJson(paths.geminiFailureReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.gemini-invocation-receipt.v1', status: 'blocked', blocker: 'gemini_response_missing', httpStatus: response.status, worker: 'defracto.workers.gemini_flash.v1', invocationCapability: 'worker.gemini_flash.invoke.v1', rawResponseHash: sha256File(paths.geminiRaw), secretMaterialWritten: false }); return null; } const data = JSON.parse(rawText); const parsed = parseCandidate(outputTextFromGemini(data)); const candidate = candidateFrom('gemini_flash', model, dispatch, parsed); writeJson(paths.candidate, candidate); writeJson(paths.geminiResponse, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.provider-response.v1', status: 'received', providerKey: 'gemini_flash', model, candidatePath: paths.candidate, candidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate), rawResponseHash: sha256File(paths.geminiRaw) }); writeJson(paths.geminiInvocationReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.gemini-invocation-receipt.v1', status: 'passed', worker: 'defracto.workers.gemini_flash.v1', invocationCapability: 'worker.gemini_flash.invoke.v1', responseArtifact: paths.geminiResponse, candidatePath: paths.candidate, candidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate), secretMaterialWritten: false }); return { providerKey: 'gemini_flash', model, candidate }; }

async function callOpenAi(dispatch, prompt, paths, primaryFailureReceipt) { const key = process.env.LOC_OPENAI_API_KEY || process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY; const model = dispatch.providers.openai.model; writeJson(paths.openaiDispatch, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.provider-dispatch.v1', status: 'dispatched', providerKey: 'openai', workerKey: 'defracto.workers.openai.story_to_tdd.v1', model, sourceStoryHash: dispatch.sourceStory.hash, fallbackFrom: 'gemini_flash', primaryFailureReceipt, secretMaterialWritten: false }); if (!key) throw new Error('openai_api_key_missing'); const request = { model, input: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a Business Analyst agent. Return only JSON with analysis, ambiguities, and acceptanceRecommendations.' }, { role: 'user', content: prompt }] }; writeJson(paths.openaiRequest, request); const response = await fetch('https://api.openai.com/v1/responses', { method: 'POST', headers: { authorization: 'Bearer ' + key, 'content-type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(request) }); const rawText = await response.text(); ensureDir(paths.openaiRaw); fs.writeFileSync(paths.openaiRaw, rawText); if (!response.ok) throw new Error('openai_response_missing:' + response.status); const data = JSON.parse(rawText); const parsed = parseCandidate(outputTextFromOpenAi(data)); const candidate = candidateFrom('openai', model, dispatch, parsed); writeJson(paths.candidate, candidate); writeJson(paths.openaiResponse, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.provider-response.v1', status: 'received', providerKey: 'openai', model, candidatePath: paths.candidate, candidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate), rawResponseHash: sha256File(paths.openaiRaw) }); writeJson(paths.openaiDispatchReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.openai-dispatch-receipt.v1', status: 'passed', dispatchArtifact: paths.openaiDispatch, dispatchHash: sha256File(paths.openaiDispatch), secretMaterialWritten: false }); writeJson(paths.openaiResponseReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.openai-response-receipt.v1', status: 'passed', responseArtifact: paths.openaiResponse, responseHash: sha256File(paths.openaiResponse), rawResponseHash: sha256File(paths.openaiRaw), candidatePath: paths.candidate, candidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate) }); writeJson(paths.openaiInvocationReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.openai-invocation-receipt.v1', status: 'passed', worker: 'defracto.workers.openai.v1', invocationCapability: 'worker.openai.responses.invoke.v1', fallbackRole: 'governed_fallback', responseArtifact: paths.openaiResponse, candidatePath: paths.candidate, candidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate), secretMaterialWritten: false }); writeJson(paths.fallbackReceipt, { schemaVersion: 'defracto.cognitive-provider-fallback-receipt.v1', status: 'passed', primaryProvider: 'gemini_flash', fallbackProvider: 'openai', primaryFailureReceipt, fallbackInvocationReceipt: paths.openaiInvocationReceipt, fallbackCandidatePath: paths.candidate, fallbackCandidateHash: sha256File(paths.candidate) }); return { providerKey: 'openai', model, candidate }; }
main().catch((error) => { console.error(error && error.stack ? error.stack : String(error)); process.exit(1); });

steps.intent: Materialize run-local cognitive BA dispatch packet.
Run generated worker adapter; this is the live cognitive provider execution boundary.
Emit Business Analysis hardening receipt from live provider candidate evidence.
Materialize Review Package proving live cognitive BA execution.

questions.whatDidYouBuild: A live cognitive BA proof lane that generated a provider worker adapter, invoked a live provider, captured a BA candidate, hardened it, and emitted receipts.
questions.whyDidYouBuildIt: The cognitive layer is the product heartbeat; live agent participation must be proved before Build Setup can claim provider reasoning.
questions.howDoIUseIt: Run story plan with a story and slice, then story implement with --target-kind cognitive-ba-live.
questions.didItPass: Yes. The generated worker returned passed and the hardening receipt accepted the candidate for review.
questions.whatEvidenceProvesIt: Dispatch, candidate, provider invocation receipts, hardening receipt, and hashes are listed in this Review Package.
questions.whatIsStillBlocked: No active blocker in this run. Future runs block or fall back according to provider policy if Gemini credentials or response are unavailable.

steps.intent: Materialize Markdown Review Package for the live cognitive BA proof.

content: A live cognitive BA proof lane that generated a provider worker adapter, invoked a live provider, captured a BA candidate, hardened it, and emitted receipts.
The cognitive layer is the product heartbeat; live agent participation must be proved before Build Setup can claim provider reasoning.
Yes. The generated worker returned passed and the hardening receipt accepted the candidate for review.
No active blocker in this run. Future runs block or fall back according to provider policy if Gemini credentials or response are unavailable.

fields.completionPosture: Live cognitive BA provider execution was performed through a generated conveyor worker adapter and receipted for review.

forbiddenClaims: provider output grants authority before hardening
completionPosture: The live cognitive BA proof runs a generated worker adapter as the external provider I/O boundary and returns accepted-for-review only after provider receipts and hardening evidence exist.
